note: KDS 41 17 00 equivalent-static params for this SRC/composite low-rise. SDS derived = 2.5*Z*Fa; Cs = SDS/(R*Ie). Edit per site geotech + structural system.
R_basis: composite/SRC ordinary moment frame (conservative); raise to ~5 for intermediate, ~8 for special
Ie_basis: normal importance (KDS 41 seismic category II); 1.2 special, 1.5 critical
